entities.name: Stag Hunt
entities.context: Classic game theory problem applied to AI age organizational dynamics

entities.name: Stag
entities.context: The massive shared prize of forward momentum and compounding capabilities in collaborative AI adoption

entities.name: Hare
entities.context: Immediate but temporary gains from harvesting productivity bumps or hoarding small wins

entities.name: Cooperation
entities.context: The deciding factor between stag and hare outcomes; belief in continued cooperation determines success

entities.name: Trust
entities.context: Required for collaborative stag hunting; shattered when companies signal they are chasing the hare

entities.name: Compounding Capabilities
entities.context: Part of the stag prize - the long-term value of sustained AI investment

entities.name: Productivity Bump
entities.context: A hare-type gain that companies harvest at the expense of long-term collaboration

relationships.context: Stag represents the cooperative outcome in the stag hunt framework
Hare represents the defection outcome in the stag hunt framework
Pursuing the stag without cooperation catches nothing
Productivity bump is an example of a hare-type immediate gain
Trust is required for sustained cooperation; harvesting gains shatters trust
Compounding capabilities are part of the stag prize
